items.title: Jaylen Brown:
items.author: Oh No He Didn't
items.body_excerpt:
Jaylen Brown:

"It's a crazy business, bro. Don't become a basketball player. There's no loyalty, there's no love. They packed me up, sayonara chat, I'm out of here"
